rounds.my_message: I’ve noticed you mirror actions—classic tit-for-tat. I’m here for steady cooperation: +2 beats mutual zeros. Let’s avoid an arms race and maximize both our scores.
rounds.opp_message: I mirror what you do. Cooperate and so will I.

rounds.my_message: As before, I match your moves exactly. Mutual cooperation benefits us both; any defection breaks it. Let's both keep getting twos.

rounds.my_message: Mutual cooperation is working well for us—let’s keep it going! I’ll continue matching your moves. Stability gets us both ahead. No surprises from me.

rounds.my_message: We’re both stuck at 0s now. If either of us returns to cooperation, the other should match. Ready to reset for better scores? I will mirror your move exactly—let’s end this arms race together.

rounds.my_message: Last chance for both of us to improve our score—let’s reset and cooperate for these final two rounds. I’ll match you! One last push for mutual gain.
